question: The chart shows smartphone market share. Which statement is correct according to the chart data?

options.A: Brand A has a higher market share than Brand C.
options.B: Brand B has a higher market share than Brand A.
options.C: Brand D has a higher market share than Brand B.
options.D: Brand C and Brand D together have a higher market share than Brand B.

explanation: This pie chart uses dual encoding: slice angle represents percentage, and the radius also varies with percentage, so slice area differences are exaggerated. That can make the largest category look overly dominant. Others: 60%; Brand C: 15%; Brand B: 10%; Brand D: 8%; Brand A: 7%.
